_comment: HSV colour ranges for XL Fitness AlphaFit barbell plates. Tune for your gym lighting.
_format: [H_low, H_high, S_low, S_high, V_low, V_high]  — OpenCV HSV (H: 0-180, S/V: 0-255)
_tuning: Set SHOW_PREVIEW=True in pi/config.py, run pi/main.py, adjust ranges until each plate colour shows a clean mask.

red._notes: Two ranges needed — red wraps at 0°/180° in HSV

white._notes: Low saturation + high value — can look grey/cream. Raise V_low if floor triggers false positives.
